mapper.select: SELECT h.h_code, r.r_code, rb.rb_score FROM reviewboard rb INNER JOIN room r ON rb.r_code = r.r_code INNER JOIN hotel h ON h.h_code = r.h_code
SELECT h.h_code, r.r_code, AVG(rb.rb_score) as 'scoreAvg' FROM reviewboard rb INNER JOIN room r ON rb.r_code = r.r_code INNER JOIN hotel h ON h.h_code = r.h_code GROUP BY h.h_code,r.r_code

SELECT COUNT(rb.rb_score) as 'reviewCount', AVG(rb.rb_score) as 'scoreAvg', MIN(r.price) as 'minPrice' FROM reviewboard rb INNER JOIN room r ON rb.r_code = r.r_code INNER JOIN hotel h ON h.h_code = r.h_code WHERE h.h_code = #{hotelcode} GROUP BY h.h_code

SELECT h.h_code, IFNULL(AVG(rb.rb_score),0) as hotelAvg , IFNULL(COUNT(rb.rb_score),0) as scoreCount FROM reviewboard rb RIGHT JOIN room r ON r.r_code = rb.r_code INNER JOIN hotel h ON h.h_code = r.h_code GROUP BY h.h_code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviewboard(rb_score, m_code, r_code, re_code) VALUES(#{rb_score}, #{m_code}, #{r_code}, #{re_code})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviewboard re INNER JOIN room r on re.r_code = r.r_code INNER JOIN member m on re.m_code = m.m_code INNER JOIN hotel h ON r.h_code = h.h_code

SELECT *FROM reviewboard re INNER JOIN room r on re.r_code = r.r_code INNER JOIN member m on re.m_code = m.m_code INNER JOIN hotel h ON r.h_code = h.h_code ORDER BY re.rb_code DESC LIMIT #{startRow}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviewboard re INNER JOIN room r on re.r_code = r.r_code INNER JOIN member m on re.m_code = m.m_code INNER JOIN hotel h ON r.h_code = h.h_code
r.roomName LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")
m.m_nickName LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")
re.rb_score LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")

SELECT * FROM reviewboard re INNER JOIN room r ON re.r_code = r.r_code INNER JOIN member m ON re.m_code = m.m_code INNER JOIN hotel h ON r.h_code = h.h_code
r.roomName LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")
m.m_nickName LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")
re.rb_score LIKE CONCAT("%",#{searchKeyword},"%")
ORDER BY re.rb_code DESC LIMIT #{startRow}, #{pageSize}
mapper.update: UPDATE reviewboard SET rb_score = #{rb_score} WHERE re_code = #{re_code}
mapper.select: SELECT r.h_code, r.r_code, rb.rb_score, r.roomName FROM reviewboard rb RIGHT JOIN room r ON r.r_code = rb.r_code WHERE r.h_code = #{h_code}
